chain.thought: Explanation: Top 10 finishes occurred in 2001 (4th), 2002 (2nd), 2005 (2nd and 6th), 2006 (2nd, 1st, 7th), and 2007 (1st). These create two consecutive streaks: 2001–2002 (2 years) and 2005–2007 (3 years). The longest consecutive run is 3 years.

judge_thought: Explanation: Top-10 finishes occurred in years 2001 (4th), 2002 (2nd), 2005 (2nd, 6th), 2006 (1st, 2nd, 7th), and 2007 (1st). The consecutive-year streaks are 2001–2002 (2 years) and 2005–2007 (3 years). 2011 was a DQ, breaking any streak. Thus, the number of consecutive years she finished in the top 10 is 3.
